common.metaDescription: File manager for your storage buckets — read-only by default.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again — if it keeps happening, check the server logs.
errorPage.descriptionWithDigest: An unexpected error occurred. Try again — if it keeps happening, check the server logs (digest {digest}).

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist — the source may have been removed.

home.title: Sources
home.description: Every bucket you have access to. Pick one to start browsing.
home.emptyDescriptionAdmin: Connect a storage bucket to start browsing your files.
home.emptyDescriptionUser: An admin needs to grant you access to a source first.

sidebar.noSourcesAdmin: No sources yet — add one from <link>Admin → Sources</link>.
sidebar.noSourcesUser: No sources available yet. An admin needs to grant you access.

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.description: Jump to a source or add a new one

account.title: Your account
account.sessionsDescription: Everywhere this account is signed in. Revoking a session signs that device out immediately.

changePassword.changeSuccess: Password changed — other sessions were signed out

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back — sign in to browse your sources.

signUp.disabledDescription: Accounts are created by an administrator on this instance — ask them for yours.
signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: New accounts start without access — an admin grants you sources.

forgotPassword.sentDescription: If an account exists for that address, a reset link is on its way. It expires in one hour.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email — we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.errorFallback: Could not send the reset email.

resetPassword.invalidTitle: This link is no longer valid
resetPassword.invalidDescription: Reset links expire after one hour and work only once. Request a fresh one.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Other devices stay signed in until their session expires.
resetPassword.successToast: Password updated — sign in with the new one
resetPassword.errorFallback: Could not reset the password — the link may have expired.

errors.credentialsBody: The bucket rejected the credentials for this source. They may have been rotated or revoked — edit the source to update them.
errors.bucketMissingBody: The bucket this source points to doesn't exist anymore. It may have been renamed or deleted — edit the source to fix the bucket name.
errors.networkBody: The endpoint didn't respond. Check the endpoint URL on this source, or your network connection.
errors.unknownBody: The bucket returned an unexpected error. Details were written to the server logs.
errors.editDenied: You are not allowed to edit this source.
errors.addDenied: You are not allowed to add files to this source.
errors.deleteDenied: You are not allowed to delete from this source.
errors.addDeniedOther: You are not allowed to add files to that source.
errors.nameExists: Something with that name already exists here.
errors.folderNameExists: A folder with that name already exists here.
errors.renameFolderFailure: Could not rename this folder — some objects may have moved already, refresh to check.
errors.duplicateTooLarge: This file is too large to duplicate on this provider (512 MB max).
errors.tooManyDuplicates: Too many copies of this file already exist here — rename one first.
errors.selectAtMost: Select at most {max} items at a time.
errors.someItemsFailedToDelete: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} could not be deleted.
errors.copyAtMost: Copy at most {max} items at a time.
errors.moveAtMost: Move at most {max} items at a time.
errors.copySelectionFailed: Could not copy the selection — try again.
errors.moveFailure: Could not move everything — some items may have moved already, refresh to check.
errors.selfMove: You can't move a folder into itself.
errors.sharingDisabled: Public share links are disabled on this instance.
errors.actionFailed: Could not complete this action — try again.
errors.folderTooLargeToMove: This folder holds more than {max} objects — too large to move in one go.
errors.selectionTooLargeToCopy: This selection holds more than {max} objects — too large to copy in one go.
errors.objectsNotDeleted: {count, plural, one {# object} other {# objects}} could not be deleted.
errors.folderTooLargeToDelete: This folder is too large to delete in one go — some objects remain, run it again.

filteredEmpty.title: No {type} in this folder
filteredEmpty.description: Nothing at this level matches the filter.

fileBrowser.emptyFolderCanUpload: Drop files here, or use Upload to add some.
fileBrowser.emptyFolderReadOnly: Files uploaded to this location will show up here.
fileBrowser.deleteFolderDescription: This permanently deletes the folder and everything inside it from the bucket. There is no undo.
fileBrowser.deleteFileDescription: This permanently deletes the object from the bucket. There is no undo.
fileBrowser.deleteBulkDescription: This permanently deletes the selection from the bucket — folders with everything inside them. There is no undo.

searchCommand.title: Search this source
searchCommand.description: Matches file names and paths across every folder
searchCommand.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search.
searchCommand.truncated: {count, plural, one {First # match — refine to narrow down} other {First # matches — refine to narrow down}}

dnd.dropToParent: Drop here to move to the parent folder

dropOverlay.title: Drop to upload
dropOverlay.description: Release to add files to this folder

shareDialog.title: Share {name}
shareDialog.description: Anyone with the link can download this file — no account needed. Manage links from Shared links.
shareDialog.copyFailedToast: Copy failed — select the link and copy it manually.

copyToDialog.title: Copy {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} to…
copyToDialog.description: Pick a source and a folder. Objects already present in the destination are skipped; nothing is removed from here.
copyToDialog.noWritableSources: You don't have edit access on any source.
copyToDialog.copiedToast: {copied, plural, one {# object copied} other {# objects copied}}{skipped, select, 0 {} other {, {skipped} skipped}} to {name}
copyToDialog.copyPartialFailedToast: {copied, plural, one {# object copied} other {# objects copied}}{skipped, select, 0 {} other {, {skipped} skipped}}, {failed} failed — run it again to retry.

moveToDialog.title: Move {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} to…
moveToDialog.description: Moving copies each object to the destination and deletes the original. Folders move everything inside them.

moveDialog.title: Move {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} into “{destLabel}”?
moveDialog.description: Moving copies each object to the destination and deletes the original. Folders move everything inside them.

folderPicker.noSubfolders: No subfolders — the selection lands right here.

uploadTray.failedCount: {count, plural, one {# upload failed} other {# uploads failed}}
uploadTray.completeCount: {count, plural, one {# upload complete} other {# uploads complete}}

previewDialog.noPreview: Could not load a preview for this file.

detailsPanel.copyFailedToast: Copy failed — your browser blocked clipboard access.
detailsPanel.loadError: Could not load the details for this file.

viewers.previewUnavailable: Could not load a preview for this file.
viewers.truncatedBanner: Showing the first 1 MB of this file.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Connect buckets and decide who can use them. A grant row gives read access; the switches add edit (upload, rename, move, new folder) and delete.
sources.emptyDescription: Add a bucket to start granting access — it stays invisible to everyone but admins until you do.
sources.connectionVerifiedNote: The connection is verified again when you save.

dialog.pickProviderDescription: Pick where your files live — connection details come next.
dialog.credentialsEncryptedNote: Credentials are encrypted before they are stored.

form.accessNote: Who can browse, edit or delete on this source is managed per user and group from the admin area.
form.secretPlaceholderEdit: Leave blank to keep the current one

cardActions.migrateAria: Copy the contents of {name} to another source

actions.removeConfirmDescription: This only removes the source here — nothing in your bucket is touched.

migrate.title: Copy contents to another source
migrate.description: Every object in <bold>{name}</bold> is copied into the destination — across providers if needed. Objects already present there are skipped, and nothing is removed from this source.
migrate.copyingStatus: Copying — large sources can take a while, keep this page open.
migrate.copiedToast: {transferred, plural, one {# object copied} other {# objects copied}}{skipped, select, 0 {} other {, {skipped} skipped}} to {name}
migrate.partialFailedToast: {transferred, plural, one {# object copied} other {# objects copied}}{skipped, select, 0 {} other {, {skipped} skipped}}, {failed} failed — run it again to retry.

picker.noProviderMatch: No provider matches “{query}”. Anything speaking the S3 API works with <link>{label}</link>.

errors.notAuthorized: You are not allowed to manage sources.
errors.connectionFailed: Connection failed — check the endpoint, bucket name and credentials.
errors.sameSourceDestination: Pick a different source as the destination.
errors.migrationFailed: Migration failed — check both sources' connectivity and try again.

usersPage.title: Users
usersPage.description: Accounts sign up themselves or are created here. New users see nothing until you grant them sources.

usersTable.confirmRemoveAdminDescription: They keep their account but only see sources they hold a grant on.
usersTable.confirmMakeAdminDescription: Admins see every source, manage accounts and grants, and read the audit log.
usersTable.confirmBanDescription: They are signed out everywhere and can no longer sign in until unbanned.
usersTable.confirmDeleteDescription: Their account, sessions and grants are permanently deleted. Their past activity stays in the audit log.

groupsPage.title: Groups
groupsPage.description: Groups bundle source access. At OIDC sign-in, claim values that exactly match a group name are assigned automatically — memberships added here by hand are never touched by that sync.
groupsPage.emptyDescription: Create one to grant several people the same sources at once — name it after an identity provider group to fill it automatically.

groupsTable.confirmDeleteDescription: Its memberships and source grants are removed — members lose whatever access came from this group.

createUserDialog.title: Create user
createUserDialog.description: The account is usable right away — share the password with its owner and grant them sources.

createGroupDialog.title: Create group
createGroupDialog.description: Members share the group’s source access. If the name exactly matches a value of your identity provider’s groups claim, members are assigned automatically at sign-in.

groupMembersDialog.description: Members share every source grant given to this group. Memberships marked oidc were assigned by the identity provider and follow its groups claim.
groupMembersDialog.emptyMembers: No members yet — add one below, or let the OIDC claim populate the group at sign-in.
groupMembersDialog.oidcBadgeTitle: Assigned by the identity provider's groups claim

sourceAccess.empty: Nobody has access yet — only admins can see this source.

settingsForm.signUpDescription: Let anyone with the URL create an email/password account. New accounts still see nothing until you grant them sources. Off by default — accounts are then created from the Users tab. OIDC sign-in is not affected: your identity provider decides who can use it.
settingsForm.oidcOnlyDescriptionConfigured: Disable every email/password entry point (sign-in, sign-up, password reset and change) — the SSO provider becomes the only way in. If the provider goes down, so does sign-in: keep an admin session open when testing.
settingsForm.oidcOnlyDescriptionUnconfigured: Disable email/password sign-in entirely. Requires an OIDC provider (OIDC_* environment variables) — configure one first.
settingsForm.sharingDescription: Let users with access to a source create public links to its files (revocable, expirable, optionally password-protected). Turning this off blocks creating new links — existing ones keep working until revoked or expired.

brandingForm.title: White labelling
brandingForm.description: Rebrand this instance: the name, logo and primary color apply to the sidebar, the sign-in page, public share pages and the browser tab.
brandingForm.noLogo: None — the app name is shown instead.
brandingForm.logoHelp: SVG, PNG or WebP, 512 KB max. Replaces the app name in the sidebar — a horizontal mark with the company name works best.
brandingForm.invalidLogoType: Use an SVG, PNG or WebP image.
brandingForm.logoTooLarge: The logo must be 512 KB or smaller.

errors.notAuthorized: You are not allowed to administrate this app.
errors.oidcNotConfigured: Configure an OIDC provider first — enabling this now would lock everyone out.
errors.brandingSaveFailed: Could not save the branding settings.
errors.brandingResetFailed: Could not reset the branding settings.
errors.createUserFailed: Could not create this account — the email may already be in use.
errors.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
errors.setRoleFailed: Could not change this user's role.
errors.groupNameTaken: A group with that name already exists.

activity.title: Activity log
activity.description: Every write across all sources — uploads, deletions, renames, moves and shares. Reads aren't recorded.
activity.emptyFilteredDescription: Nothing in the log matches these filters — clear them to see everything.
activity.emptyDescription: Uploads, deletions, renames and moves will show up here as they happen.

shares.title: Shared links
shares.descriptionAdmin: Public links on this instance. Revoking one kills it immediately for everyone.
shares.descriptionUser: Public links you created. Revoking one kills it immediately for everyone.
shares.emptyDescription: Share a file from the browser and the link will show up here.
shares.copyFailedToast: Copy failed — open the link and copy the address bar.

errors.linkUnavailable: This link is no longer available.
